title: Phone & Digital Life
description: Stay connected in India: SIM cards, wifi, calls, messaging, and digital payments.
situation: Modern essentials: getting a SIM, connecting online, making calls, and paying with UPI apps.

phrases.tip: You usually need a passport and photo to buy a SIM in India.

phrases.native: मेरा फ़ोन चार्ज नहीं हो रहा
phrases.transliteration: mera phone charge nahin ho raha
phrases.pronunciation: MEH-raa phone charge nuh-HEEN hoh RUH-haa

phrases.english: Is there a network signal here?

phrases.native: मैं आपको यूपीआई से पैसे भेजता हूँ
phrases.transliteration: main aapko UPI se paise bhejta hoon
phrases.english: I'll send you money via UPI
phrases.pronunciation: main AAP-koh UPI seh PAI-seh BHEJ-taa hoon
phrases.tip: A woman says bhejti hoon. UPI is India's instant payment system.
Most shops in India accept QR-based payments.

phrases.native: क्या आप मेरा नंबर सेव कर लेंगे?
phrases.transliteration: kya aap mera number save kar lenge?
phrases.pronunciation: kyaa aap MEH-raa number save kar LEN-geh
